label: Stuff properties
description: Properties for stuff materials controlling stat offsets/factors, categories, color, appearance, and crafting effects.

stuffAdjective.label: Stuff adjective
stuffAdjective.description: Localized adjective appended to thing labels when built from this material (e.g. 'steel table').

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight controlling how often this material is chosen for random item generation.

categories.label: Categories
categories.description: StuffCategoryDef references for the stuff groups this material belongs to.

statOffsets.label: Stat offsets
statOffsets.description: Named map of StatDef to additive offset applied to things built from this material.

statFactors.label: Stat factors
statFactors.description: Named map of StatDef to multiplicative factor applied to things built from this material.

color.label: Color
color.description: RGBA tint applied to things built from this material.

appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.description: StuffAppearanceDef that selects the texture variant used for this material.

constructEffect.label: Construct effect
constructEffect.description: EffecterDef played while constructing things from this material.

soundMeleeHit.label: Sound melee hit
soundMeleeHit.description: SoundDef played when a weapon made of this material strikes a target.

soundImpact.label: Sound impact
soundImpact.description: SoundDef played when a projectile impacts something made of this material.

canSuggestUseDefaultStuff.label: Can suggest use default stuff
canSuggestUseDefaultStuff.description: Whether the game may suggest this as a default material when no preferred material is available.

possibleColors.label: Possible colors
possibleColors.description: List of RGBA color strings selectable by the player for pawns wearing or carrying this material.
